_rawTooltip.fullTooltip:
Locke teleports to a location, dealing [[0]] to nearby enemies on arrival.

On his next Attack, he dashes to his target, dealing [[1]] to all enemies in his path. Each hit consumes Soul Nails.

If Locke scores a takedown, the Cooldown of this Ability is reset.

Locke throws a binding artifact to a location, dealing [[0]] and [[1]] enemies in the area by 99%, decaying over 2 seconds. The artifact marks enemies hit for 5 seconds, sealing away marked enemy champions brought below 10/11/12%, and resetting the duration of the mark on other affected champions.

After the duration ends, if at least one champion was sealed, the artifact lands on the ground. Locke can pick up the artifact to permanently increase its execution threshold by 0.5%, and refund 20% of his current Cooldown, for each champion sealed.

[[2]]The artifact will linger on the ground for this Ability's current Cooldown at the time of sealing.
